> Attempts to install fresh Gnome-2 fails due to fetch errors for

> >How-To-Repeat:
> Install FreeBSD-7
> Upgrade OS to latest Stable
> Upgrade all ports
> Attempt to install Gnome-2 from ports
> >Fix:
> Make lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2 available on source servers defined in the
> port's makefile
